title: Running Gemma 4 26B at 5 tokens/sec on a 13-year-old Xeon with no GPU
summary: Demonstrates running a 26B parameter LLM (Gemma 4) on a 13-year-old CPU-only Xeon server at 5 tokens/sec, likely via aggressive quantization, kernel optimization, and memory management. Highlights extreme edge-case deployment for resource-constrained environments.
